refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key analysis components (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) to ensure clarity and verifiability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, detected obstacles, and delineated work zones, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm to generate digital terrain models and obstacle maps.
DP3: Use GIS-based work-zone delineation and annotation tools.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 + DP2 + DP3 combined as an integrated worksite mapping subsystem.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle mapping algorithms.
Integration of GIS tools with sensor data processing.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled but modular, allowing clear interfaces and manageable integration.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-quality sensor data.
Risk of sensor data noise affecting mapping accuracy.
Risk of integration complexity between sensor fusion and GIS tools.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor sensor data quality and modularize GIS integration to reduce coupling risk.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for worksite mapping including sensor data processing, terrain and obstacle modeling, and work-zone representation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and Teleoperation for real-time updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of worksite mapping functionality with high containment and low diffusion.
Provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping; low containment for mapping.
Consumes mapping data for remote operation but does not implement mapping.
May consume mapping data for safety alerts but no direct mapping responsibility.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Worksite mapping is best centralized within the NGHE Solution module to ensure data integrity, reduce diffusion, and maintain clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Risk of delayed updates if data exchange with Vehicle and Teleoperation is not optimized.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution for sensor data processing and GIS integration to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by the selected DPs with clear logical mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk as mapping functionality is centralized in NGHE Solution.
Interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation are well defined and limited.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the primary owner, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated worksite model generation and data exchange through known interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Modularize NGHE Solution internally to handle complexity.
Ensure robust interface protocols for Telemetry and Tasking.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: GIS tools can be integrated effectively.
open_risks: Sensor data noise impacting mapping accuracy.
Integration complexity between sensor fusion and GIS.
